nasb.text: Let the nations be aroused And come up to the valley of Jehoshaphat, For there I will sit to judge All the surrounding nations.

esv.text: Let the nations stir themselves up and come up to the Valley of Jehoshaphat; for there I will sit to judge all the surrounding nations.

cnv.text: “萬國都當奮起， 上到約沙法谷去。 因為我必坐在那裡， 審判四圍的列國。

ccb.text: “万国都要起来， 上到约沙法谷受审判， 因为我要坐在那里审判他们。
